degraded: complexity classifier returned touches_auth — a prose-keyword false positive (prior_source=keyword, history_n=0); the diff touches zero auth code (two compliance sibling modules + net-neutral RTM/group_d edits + tests + a glossary line). Overridden to 'medium'; F11 recomputes risk from diff-predicates.

surface_verification.justification: Framework tooling change: two compliance sibling modules (_group_d_traceability, _rtm_layer_columns), net-neutral edits to the capped rtm_generator.py + group_d.py, a glossary line, and tests. No runnable app surface (no web/cli/api entrypoint added or modified). Exercised entirely by the pytest suites (compliance 1090, shared 373 selected, integration 25) plus the real producer(test_links manifest)->file->consumer(group_d + rtm_generator) round-trip probes recorded in the iterate ADR Confidence Calibration.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 — RTM renders per-FR Unit|Integration|E2E columns from the manifest; an FR with unit-but-no-E2E is visibly E2E: MISSING (a glyph, not a bare number); pre-existing positional columns (Reconciled?=7, Status=8) are unshifted
behaviors.evidence: plugins/shipwright-compliance/tests/test_rtm_layer_columns.py::test_header_has_layer_columns + ::test_unit_ok_e2e_missing_renders_glyphs_not_numbers + ::test_pre_existing_positional_columns_unshifted PASSED; real-monorepo render probe (ADR Confidence Calibration probe 4)

behaviors.behavior: AC2 — D-orphan fires MEDIUM on a test tagged with a removed/absent FR and stays green when every tag resolves live; both namespace fan-out directions pinned (live-in-any-namespace = not orphan; removed-only = orphan)
AC3 — D-layer fires on an active FR missing a required layer, severity by priority; legacy-provenance FRs are advisory (surfaced, no any_fail) per carry-forward #2 / Spec §9
AC4 — D1 no longer reports COVERED for an FR whose only event has tests_total:0 and no test link (former false-green regression pinned)

PANEL-FIX O1 — D1 link-proof: an explicit/post-rollout FR needs a tested event AND a real manifest test link (two separate per-FR proofs); a link for a DIFFERENT FR does not cover this FR; legacy FRs keep the event-only proof (no monorepo avalanche)
Carry-forward #1 — D-layer fan-out fail-closed: an ok on a display id shared across active namespaces is NOT credited (ambiguous_fanout); a unique id ok IS credited
Carry-forward #3 — invalid_layers (author typo'd Layers cell) surfaced as a HARD D-layer finding naming the FR + raw token
R3 fail-closed manifest — absent / non-v2 / malformed manifest → D-orphan+D-layer SKIP (no proof != pass), never a silent pass
PANEL-FIX O6 — end-to-end wiring: group_d.run emits D-orphan + D-layer findings from a committed valid manifest (guards the out.extend splice)
PANEL-FIX O5 — the orphan suggested-command carries only the schema-pinned FR id (never the untrusted test path); the path stays in evidence (no quote-break/injection)
behaviors.evidence: plugins/shipwright-compliance/tests/test_group_d_traceability.py::test_orphan_flags_confirmed_orphan_medium (asserts path NOT in cmd, path IS in evidence) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC5 / anti-ratchet — new logic in ≤300-LOC siblings; capped rtm_generator.py (763) + group_d.py (464) net-neutral; test files under 300 or unbaselined; RED-before verified
behaviors.evidence: anti_ratchet_check --worktree: no block (test_audit_groups_a_d.py held at 789); wc -l all new/edited source ≤300; full compliance suite 1101 PASSED

behaviors.behavior: PANEL-2 M1 — an UNKNOWN required_layers_source token (rename/drift/hand-edit) missing a required layer is fail-closed HARD, never silently advisory (check_layer + refine_d1_covered use `not in _LEGACY_SOURCES`, not `== explicit`)

PANEL-2 M2a — a display id shared across namespaces including a REMOVED occurrence is a collision; its fanned coverage ok is NOT credited by D-layer and the fanned test is surfaced as a possible_orphan
PANEL-2 M2b — the RTM renders a fanned collision ok as ? (ambiguous), agreeing with D-layer's fail-closed ambiguous_fanout (no RTM-green-while-gate-flags)

PANEL-2 M3 — check_orphan surfaces an unknown-category orphan fail-closed (pass only when nothing to surface); load_manifest re-validates against traceability_schema.json on READ and rejects an out-of-vocab enum (skip, never trusted)

PANEL-2 S4/S5/S6 — invalid_tags surfaced as a hygiene finding; the D1 link-proof requires coverage==ok (a skipped link is not coverage, R1); R1 pinned end-to-end via build_manifest (skipped evidence → MISSING → D-layer explicit HARD)

PANEL-3 FIX1/2/3 — check_layer's missing/None required_layers_source defaults to a NON-legacy sentinel → HARD (matching refine_d1_covered, no fail-open); the honest renamed explicit-requires-link test + real-path out-of-vocab-source→schema-invalid→SKIP + a visible D1 fallback note when the manifest is PRESENT-but-untrusted (absent → silent, no note)
